metadata.description: Personal Claude Code toolkit: Databricks, Google Workspace, JIRA, diagrams, and workflows

plugins.name: fe-app-dev
plugins.description: Mobile and web app development workflows — scaffold new apps (React Native, Expo, Next.js, Swift, Flutter), GitHub workflow management, deployment (Vercel, Netlify, App Store, EAS), and debugging

plugins.name: fe-databricks-tools
plugins.description: Databricks workflow tools: authentication, queries, deployments, workspace setup, apps, and demos

plugins.name: fe-google-tools
plugins.description: Google Docs, Sheets, Slides, Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Tasks, and Forms with professional formatting, charts, formulas, and hyperlinks

plugins.name: fe-specialized-agents
plugins.description: Specialized agents for web dev testing and diagram generation

plugins.name: fe-vibe-setup
plugins.description: Setup, configuration, and validation for the vibe environment

plugins.name: fe-shared-resources
plugins.description: Shared resource files (Python utilities, configs) used by multiple plugins

plugins.name: fe-jira-tools
plugins.description: JIRA ticket operations: search, view, comment, and create tickets (configurable for any JIRA instance)

plugins.name: fe-workflows
plugins.description: Workflows for sizing, documentation, security, support, troubleshooting, competitive analysis, architecture diagrams, and more

plugins.name: fe-macos-scheduler
plugins.description: Schedule and manage recurring local macOS launchd tasks. Create tasks that run Claude prompts on intervals, calendar schedules, or file-change watchers.

plugins.name: lean-sigma-tools
plugins.description: Lean Six Sigma process improvement skills: SIPOC diagrams, FMEA risk tables, and swimlane process maps
